scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @tinctura/shared" "npm run dev -w @tinctura/server" "npm run dev -w @tinctura/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tinctura/shared && npm run build -w @tinctura/client && npm run build -w @tinctura/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tinctura/shared && npm run typecheck -w @tinctura/server && npm run typecheck -w @tinctura/client
